name: Josidog Finest Mix Pate Dog Wet Food 415g
shortDescription: JosiDog Pâté Finest Mix combines the best of 4 flavours in an unbelievably delicious recipe! This tasty blend of ingredients, with no unnecessary additives and plenty of goodness is surely a favourite of adult dogs.
description: JosiDog Pate Finest Mix combines the best of 4 flavors in an unbelievably delicious recipe! This tasty blend of ingredients, with no unnecessary additives and plenty of goodness is surely a favorite of adult dogs. Pâté with 4 different meat varieties, for adult dogs With Vitamin E to improve cell protection With Vitamin D3 to support stable bone development No fuss: no added sugar, colours, flavours or preservatives Complete food for adult dogs. Beef, Chicken, Lamb, Duck and animal derivatives; cereals; minerals; derivatives of vegetable origin. Feeding Guide: weight 5kg 10kg 20kg 35kg feed quantities/24h 320 – 380g 540 -600g 800 – 1000g 1400g – 1550g Please note that the quantities stated are a guide only and must be adapted to your animal’s nutritional status and its activity. Please make sure your animal always has fresh water. After opening, keep refrigerated. between 2 to 6 °C and use at room temperature within 24 hours.
